function encode(obj, stringify = String) { const result = new URLSearchParams(); for (const key in obj) { const val = obj[key]; if (val !== void 0) { result.set(key, stringify(val)); } } return result.toString(); } function toValue(str) { if (!str) return ""; if (str === "false") return false; if (str === "true") return true; return +str * 0 === 0 && +str + "" === str ? +str : str; } function decode(str) { const searchParams = new URLSearchParams(str); const result = {}; for (const [key, value] of searchParams.entries()) { const previousValue = result[key]; if (previousValue == null) { result[key] = toValue(value); } else if (Array.isArray(previousValue)) { previousValue.push(toValue(value)); } else { result[key] = [previousValue, toValue(value)]; } } return result; } export { decode, encode }; //# sourceMappingURL=qss.js.map
